summary: The test suite covers all core module functions (Get-SecretStatus, Get-RotationReport, Format-RotationReport, Invoke-SecretRotationValidator) and demonstrates good TDD structure with clear fixture setup, proper BeforeAll/AfterAll lifecycle management, and independent tests. It tests secret classification, exit codes (0/1/2), multiple output formats (markdown/JSON), and several error scenarios (missing files, malformed JSON, malformed dates, boundary conditions like expiring exactly today). However, there are gaps: some CLI wrapper parameters in validate-secrets.ps1 (-FailSoft, -OutputPath, -Now parameter parsing) lack direct unit tests; edge cases around empty RequiredBy arrays and null values are untested; and comments explaining the TDD approach are minimal. The separate test-harness.ps1 provides integration testing via act/workflow, but its token-matching assertions are brittle (regex escaping, exact string matching). Overall, the suite would catch most regressions in the core module but has blind spots in CLI parameter coverage and some edge case handling.
